news.t: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PCLN is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 5.09%, Applied Materials at 4.83%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.43%, Ecolab at 3.35%, and Cadence Design Systems at 3.31%.

overview.description: The Pictet Cleaner Planet ETF (PCLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Country World index. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation by investing in companies that contribute positively to the transition toward a greener, more eco-friendly economy. The funds strategy involves a two-step process to identify cleaner planet companies. PCLN was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Pictet.

data.title: AI-Driven ETF Close to Hitting $100M in Just 3 Months
data.text: The rapid deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) is evident; 99% of CEOs say their companies are investing in the technology. Apparently, AI is also quick at garnering assets.

data.title: Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
data.text: Pictet Asset Management is deepening its footprint in the U.S. market with the debut of two active ETFs focused on emerging markets.  The Pictet Emerging Markets Debt ETF (EMFI) and the Pictet Emergin...

data.title: Pictet Asset Management Launches First U.S. ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pictet Asset Management announced the launch of three actively-managed ETFs to bring the strategies to U.S. financial advisors and investors.
